# Renewal360

Renewal360 is an AI-powered renewal automation platform for SaaS customer success teams. It helps teams identify renewal risk, draft context-aware outreach, approve AI-generated emails, and act before accounts go silent.

## Key Pages

- Homepage: https://renewal360.in/
- Features: https://renewal360.in/features
- Pricing: https://renewal360.in/pricing
- How it works: https://renewal360.in/how-it-works
- Blog: https://renewal360.in/blog
- Contact: https://renewal360.in/contact

## Blog Posts

- How Renewal360 Works: https://renewal360.in/blog/how-renewal360-works
- ChurnZero Alternative for Growing SaaS Teams: https://renewal360.in/blog/churnzero-alternative-growing-saas-teams
- Totango Alternative for Faster Renewal Automation: https://renewal360.in/blog/totango-alternative-faster-renewal-automation
- What is Renewal Automation?: https://renewal360.in/blog/what-is-renewal-automation
- Gainsight vs Totango vs Renewal360: https://renewal360.in/blog/gainsight-vs-totango-vs-renewal360
- How to Automate SaaS Renewal Emails: https://renewal360.in/blog/how-to-automate-saas-renewal-emails
- Why SaaS Companies Lose Renewals: https://renewal360.in/blog/why-saas-companies-lose-renewals

## Preferred Summary

Renewal360 helps lean SaaS teams turn renewal data into approved actions. Instead of adding another dashboard, it automates renewal follow-up workflows: CRM sync, health scoring, AI-drafted emails, human approval, reply-aware sequence stopping, and executive visibility.
